---
title: "Day 2: Patterns, processes, and predictions"
---

## Program {.unnumbered}

- **Lecture:** Thematic case study presentation and hypothesis definition.
- **Break**
- **Practical:** Designing simulation experiments: hypotheses as counterfactuals.
- **Lunch Break**
- **Practical:** Analysing biodiversity outputs from `gen3sis` simulations.
- **Break**
- **Practical:** Designing simulation experiments: hypotheses as counterfactuals.

## Core material used {.unnumbered}

- CBA output and landscape work:
  - [Day2_Prac4_outputs.qmd](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/Day2_Prac4_outputs.qmd)
  - [Day2_Prac5_landscapes.qmd](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/Day2_Prac5_landscapes.qmd)
  - [Day3_landscape_development.qmd](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/Day3_landscape_development.qmd)
- YoMos workshop methods:
  - [gen3sis_workshop.qmd](../ref/gen3sis_yomos_2024-main/gen3sis_workshop.qmd) (Sections 3–4)
- Day 2 configuration references:
  - [config_islands_simple_Day2Prac5.R](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/configs/config_islands_simple_Day2Prac5.R)
  - [config_M0_TH.R](../ref/gen3sis_yomos_2024-main/config/config_M0_TH.R)
  - [config_M2_TH.R](../ref/gen3sis_yomos_2024-main/config/config_M2_TH.R)
